productTitle: MikroTik hEX S 2025 Router – Gigabit Ethernet, SFP, RouterOS
name: MikroTik hEX S (2025)
title: MikroTik hEX S (2025)
title_extended: MikroTik hEX S 2025 Router – Gigabit Ethernet, SFP, RouterOS

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Performance
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik hEX S (E60iUGS) is a powerful and efficient router designed for wired network environments where wireless connectivity is not required. Ideal for small offices, remote branches, or advanced home setups, it combines robust hardware with enterprise-level software flexibility. The device is powered by a dual-core 880 MHz MT7621A CPU and 256 MB RAM, ensuring smooth multitasking, fast routing, and stable performance even with multiple simultaneous processes. With five Gigabit Ethernet ports and one SFP port for fiber connectivity, the hEX S offers plenty of options for local and long-distance network infrastructure. Its compact size fits easily in cabinets, shelves, or tight spots without sacrificing performance or reliability. The hEX S is passively cooled, which not only reduces noise but also lowers the risk of hardware failure due to moving parts.

detailed_description.heading: Versatile Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik hEX S (2025) stands out with its flexibility in network configuration and power management. It features five Gigabit Ethernet LAN ports for fast and stable data transfer, and one SFP port supporting speeds up to 2.5 Gbps - ideal for high-speed fiber uplinks and backbone connections. For power options, port 1 supports passive PoE input (18 – 57 V), while port 5 can deliver passive PoE output (up to 57 V and 500 mA), allowing you to power compatible devices like IP cameras, wireless access points, or VoIP phones directly from the router. This simplifies deployment and reduces cabling complexity. Additionally, a USB 3.0 port is available for connecting external storage or LTE modems, expanding the router’s functionality. Note that this model does not have a microSD card slot, so additional local storage options are limited. This setup simplifies deployment and reduces cabling complexity for demanding network environments.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Routing Features
detailed_description.text: Running RouterOS v7 Level 4, the MikroTik hEX S offers comprehensive network management beyond basic routing. RouterOS offers extensive features including static and dynamic routing (RIP, OSPF, BGP), firewall filtering, bandwidth shaping, NAT, DHCP, hotspot functionality, and more. This gives advanced users and administrators full control over how network traffic is handled and secured. IPsec hardware encryption support ensures secure VPN tunnels without compromising throughput. The router also supports VLAN tagging, bridging, load balancing, and failover configurations, making it a great fit for both advanced home users and small-to-medium businesses.

documents.title: Technical Specs / Datasheet - MikroTik hEX S (2025)

comments.name: Sami
comments.text: My first Mikrotik product, after one evening of playing with the RouterOS on a bit more complicated home network, I'm impressed! Everything is kinda hard to configure, but once you get the hang of it, this is even easier than with OpenWrt&LuCI!

comments.name: Peter
comments.text: Small but powerful router, switch, firewall, etc. Once you get used to RouterOS 7 it is a pleasure to work with it.

comments.name: Arttu
comments.text: Reliable work horse, this 2025 model has double the classic CPU, still a good duck!

comments.name: Random
comments.text:
Finding the userguide was challenging since it is not referenced on the product page. 
Initial settings perfect for basic usage, cloud dns address provided on the box excellent, setting up an external dynamic dns pointer was easy.
Manual is very extensive, and perhaps complex to the point of incomprehensibility for basic users, however any information one may desire is there.
The web interface has a lot, since *everything* is there. No hidden menus and weird shit like other blinking boxes tend to have.
